steps.t: The Lair of the Gloom-lord can be found near Seregost, deep within Agarnaith. You should find the Lair of the Gloom-lord.
Múrgzot the Gloom-lord can be found somewhere in the Lair of the Gloom-lord. You should find Múrgzot the Gloom-lord.
Múrgzot the Gloom-lord can be found in the Lair of the Gloom-lord. You should approach Múrgzot the Gloom-lord.
